summary: CRITICAL: Workflow doesn't create required act-result.txt file per task spec. test-harness.ps1 provided but never invoked by workflow; expected results don't match actual output. Code duplication: lines 46–87 duplicate Pester tests; scope formatting (scope-format pattern) repeated 3× in changelog generation. Actionlint validation silently skips if unavailable (line 132–134). semantic-version-bumper.ps1 lacks Set-StrictMode. While PowerShell script itself functional, workflow integration fundamentally broken.
